title: Option Focus Fix
description: Fixes a bug introduced in 1.19.4, which made options stay focused even if you don't hover over them after clicking.
body:
In 1.19.4, Mojang added yet another Bug. When you click an option, it will set focused. But for some reason it doesn't get unfocused whenever you stop hovering over it. This Mod fixes this. ~~Only Downside: It seems like it breaks the feature that allows you to tab between options, but i highly doubt anyone uses it. and if you do, it shouldn't introduce this bug in the first place.~~
**The 1.3.0-Rewrite Fixes this issue, along with adding an new method to do the stuff, which works more reliable**
